name: Omar Al-Qahtani
whatsapp_message:
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله عمر 👋
لاحظنا أنك حصلت على 25 درجة في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسن درجاتك قبل الاختبار القادم بـ 6 أيام 💪 هل تقدر نتواصل اليوم عشان نشتغل على المواضيع الصعبة معك؟
action: Call Omar directly today to establish first contact, assess specific learning gaps from the quiz, and schedule an urgent tutoring session before the next quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Omar has never been contacted by a facilitator despite critical quiz failure (25/100) and is in remedial track—immediate intervention is essential to prevent further academic decline and provide personalized support within the narrow 6-day window.
